CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Michael Begert, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha , CSR: C. Yount #2737

Jeremy Kamras, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Howard Rice Nemerovski Canady Falk & Rabkin
Plaintiff's Witness: Jonathan Williams Hughes, was placed under oath and direct examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant 5.12 Construction, Inc. dba San Francisco Garage Co. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $132,474.55
Pre-judgment Interest - $45,563.64
Costs - $881.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $178,919.19

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2011 Continued To Dec-02-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
